telos: Turn a future idea into the strongest feasible prototype by discovering the docs, skills, connectors, and planning helpers each model needs before build.
connectors_needed: xAI API when live Grok review is required
missing_capabilities: live Grok API review depends on xAI credentials and exposed ai-peer tools
recommendation_to_claude: Use Grok advisory review when available; otherwise require a manual challenge packet before high-risk builds.
